reviews.review_description:
Jj here. the past month ive been growing the game and its been working. So im here to tell you some things people have said. To bring the watch back so people can monster hunt. Flash light, a free flashlight cosmetic you spawn with for more light. Cosmetics, you can make you own like hats, holdables and badges. Love the game keep up the good work.

Sincerely JJ

I met your friend JJ he is super nice he also added me on vr this is the best horror game ever i got super scared i threw my headset😂  definetly 5 stars!.


~Ahouratb and JJ
This game is good in my opinion. Just update the game more frequently and the game will probably be the next gth. Keep up the good work

reviews.review_title: really good and it even scared me
reviews.review_description: so i normally don't get scared in other horror games but this one actually gave me a fright the first time i played it and it's honestly really good for a gorilla tag copy in the last thing that i want to see is that this game was really good for a gorilla tech copy i know it hurts so that one spots also by the way you should make the monsters move with their hands there be a lot more accurate exactly like my games anyway bye

This game is so good when me and my friends were making a video we started calling each other lieutenant, Sargent, and boss. Then the next day we got our ranks had them for two days then a new guys came and instead of starting in officer like me and the boss explained the boss let him go in sargent so i caused a revolution and made a election to see who would be president and he lost now im the co-chief 4th highest rank. But overall i love this game and it is really fun and scary. Btw I’m gonna try out for finger painter when my second video hits 250 views. Also sorry for the first two submissions I didn’t see the thing at the top.
amazing game

GREAT GREAT!!!
Love it, made a video on it https://www.youtube.com/shorts/IqcS3Q60WE
It’s also really scary lol

Everyone get this game
Sad not many people play, this game deserves better!!!
